steps.title: Translate the problem into equations
steps.content: The string is cut into two parts that sum to 108 inches: $x + y = 108$. The phrase x is 8 more than 4 times y translates to: $x = 4y + 8$.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for x
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 4y + 8$ into the first equation:
$$(4y + 8) + y = 108$$
$$5y + 8 = 108$$
$$5y = 100$$
$$y = 20$$
Then $x = 4(20) + 8 = 88$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
